failures.testTitle: HV003 - All strategies fail throws with audit
failures.reasoning: Test expects all locator strategies to fail and throw an audit error, but the assertion receives false instead of true, indicating the self-healing mechanism did not behave as designed.
failures.suggestedAction: Review SmartLocator's fallback strategy logic at healing-verification.spec.ts:71 to ensure it correctly throws when all strategies are exhausted.
